General.Name: Deutsche Grundstücksauktionen AG
General.Description: Deutsche Grundstücksauktionen AG provides real estate auction services in Germany. The company is involved in auctioning of third-party real estate and rights equivalent to real estate on behalf of private, commercial, and public owners, as well as conducts auctions online. It also engages in the real estate brokerage business. In addition, the company specializes in the auction of foreign real estate and property rights. The company was formerly known as Berliner Grundstücksauktionen-Organisationsgesellschaft mbH & Co KG and changed its name to Deutsche Grundstücksauktionen AG in 1998. Deutsche Grundstücksauktionen AG was founded in 1984 and is based in Berlin, Germany.
